item.title: ONLY & SONS Onsal PU Noos Otw Chaqueta Negro Black Large para Hombre
item.description: Tienes ONLY & SONS Onsal PU Noos Otw Chaqueta Negro Black Large para Hombre aqui! 🔎: Polyester lining for a comfortable feel materialFabricComposition: Outer: 85% Polyester, 13% Cotton, 2% Viscose; Lining: 100% Polyester Care Label: Faux leather jacket Long Sleeves 🛒 Comprar!!!
